description: Archive each conversation turn to a per-session markdown file in a git repo. Triggers on Stop (right after each assistant turn, for low-latency archiving), UserPromptSubmit (a backstop that also captures any multi-message reply blocks flushed to the transcript after Stop fired), and SessionEnd (final turn). The archiver is idempotent — blocks are de-duplicated by message uuid — so the overlapping triggers never produce duplicate content. A SessionStart hook checks runtime dependencies (python3 + git). The archive hooks guard on python3 so a missing interpreter is a no-op, never a blocked prompt.

hooks.command: command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 && python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/archive.py" || true
command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 && python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/archive.py" || true
command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 && python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/archive.py" || true
